reviews.review_title: Please 😢😭 get the game on Meta Quest 1
reviews.review_description: I have a quest 2, but my brother has a quest one. There are very limited games we can play together, but this game is one that would be so easy to play on together. All we would have to do is touch controls together. But he can’t even get it because it’s not available on Meta quest one😢. Please developers, this is such a great game but if you put it on Meta Quest 1, it would be the greatest! 🙏🥺😃😁😇😸
So far by what I can tell it has great potential but the circling BS has got to stop

developer_response.body: Thanks, this bug is fixed in the latest version.

reviews.review_description: Great AR experience. Can’t wait for more!
Really fun to play an RPG with my friends in AR.
Before I know it I'm so freaking dizzy because everything just spins around you in the same direction.

developer_response.body: Thanks, this bug is fixed in the latest version.

reviews.review_description:
Enemy’s keep spinning in a circle witch made me nauseous 
￼￼

developer_response.body: Thanks, this bug is fixed in the latest version.

reviews.review_description: It was pretty awesome fighting the giant fire monster in augmented reality. I don't see too many other games like this and can't wait for future updates! Multiplayer is awesome too.
